title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: Tutorial on Infrastructure as Code using AWS CDK with Python to build a serverless REST API. Covers building the same architecture manually via AWS console versus declaratively with CDK, then deploying, testing, and tearing down the entire infrastructure with single commands.
